summary: Iteration 4 (modular refactor + X-Admin-Token guard) verified end-to-end. Backend: 35/35 pytest tests pass — 18 iter1 regression + 7 iter3 (with admin headers added) + 10 NEW iter4 admin-guard tests (3xMissing header => 401, 3xWrong token => 401, info/import/idempotent/reset with correct token => 200, non-admin endpoint unaffected). All endpoint contracts preserved after the server.py split into core/* + routers/*. Frontend: TeacherActions toolbar (export-csv/pdf/import-dataset) renders, import-dataset-btn opens import-dialog, confirm-import-btn imports 30 students using ADMIN_HEADERS (no 401), reset-dataset-btn restores baseline, dialog already_imported counter updates 0 -> 30 -> 0. Dataset reset to baseline (10 students) at end of run.

verification_results.modular_refactor_regression: PASS — every endpoint listed in iter1/iter3 still returns identical schema after server.py was split into core/db.py, core/llm.py, core/analytics.py, core/seed.py, core/security.py, core/models.py and routers/{students,quizzes,teacher,tutor,admin}.py. server.py is now ~55 lines.
verification_results.admin_guard_missing_header: PASS — GET /api/admin/open-dataset/info, POST /import, POST /reset all return 401 {detail: 'Invalid admin token'} when X-Admin-Token header is absent.
verification_results.admin_guard_wrong_token: PASS — same three endpoints return 401 with detail='Invalid admin token' when X-Admin-Token=wrong-token.
verification_results.admin_guard_correct_token: PASS — same three endpoints return 200 with the documented payloads when X-Admin-Token=deis-demo-admin-2026 (loaded from backend/.env ADMIN_TOKEN).
verification_results.admin_idempotency: PASS — first import: imported_students=30, already_existed=0; second import: imported_students=0, already_existed=30 (with header).
verification_results.non_admin_endpoints_unaffected: PASS — /api/students still returns 200 with no header.
verification_results.frontend_teacher_actions: PASS — clicking import-dataset-btn opens import-dialog (data-testid='import-dialog'). Confirm-import-btn fires POST /admin/open-dataset/import with X-Admin-Token header and imports 30 students; dialog ALREADY IMPORTED tile flips to 30. Reset-dataset-btn flips it back to 0 (verified screenshot).

critical_code_review_comments: (GOOD) server.py reduced from 909 -> ~55 lines; core/* + routers/* split is clean and matches FastAPI convention.
(MINOR) core/security.py: require_admin_token uses HTTPException(401) — fine, but consider WWW-Authenticate header for spec correctness ('Bearer' or custom 'X-Admin-Token').

(MINOR) ADMIN_TOKEN is duplicated in both backend/.env and frontend/.env — REACT_APP_ADMIN_TOKEN is bundled into the JS at build time so it's effectively public. Acceptable for demo but document that this guard prevents only casual abuse, not real attackers (already noted in security.py docstring — good).
(MINOR) @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI 0.110+; migrate to lifespan context manager (carry-over from iter3).
(MINOR) Avatar index in admin.py now uses hashlib.md5 — deterministic across restarts (previous review item resolved).
(MINOR) Router prefixes are nested correctly (api_router prefix='/api' + students prefix='/students' => /api/students). Good.

(MINOR) test_iteration3.py admin-mutation calls were updated in this run to send X-Admin-Token (otherwise 401 cascade would fail 6 tests). Suggest also adding a conftest.py-level fixture for ADMIN_HEADERS to avoid repetition across new test files.
(MINOR) routers/students.py recommendations() catches bare Exception when JSON parsing the LLM reply — fine, but logs would help debug LLM drift in production.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py (added X-Admin-Token header to all 5 admin calls)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (TeacherActions import + reset flow end-to-end with header works)

test_credentials: X-Admin-Token: deis-demo-admin-2026 (env: backend ADMIN_TOKEN, frontend REACT_APP_ADMIN_TOKEN). No user auth — student IDs stu_001..stu_010, quiz IDs qz_001..qz_006.
seed_data_creation: UCI dataset reset to baseline (10 seeded students, 0 UCI imports) at end of testing per main-agent instruction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 = pure refactor + admin guard. All 35 pytest tests green. test_iteration4.py is parametrized for the 3 admin endpoints x missing/wrong header. Both test_iteration3.py and test_iteration4.py auto-reset the UCI dataset before/after their module so they are safe to re-run in any order. Frontend uses REACT_APP_ADMIN_TOKEN from frontend/.env — if that env var is empty after a deploy, every admin API call from the UI will 401. The previous iteration_3 LOW issue (clipboard inside iframe) is unchanged and environmental, not a code defect.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found this iteration.
